prompt: Create a highly detailed cinematic anime illustration of a cyberpunk feudal Japan city. In the foreground, a young elf-eared anime girl with short pale blue bob hair and red eyes sits calmly on the edge of a dark tiled temple roof, legs forward, one hand resting behind her. She wears an ornate black-and-crimson futuristic samurai kimono armor outfit with layered sleeves, straps, belts, small hanging talismans, red trim, floral embroidery, mechanical details, white thigh-high socks, and black armored geta-like footwear. Add a small red flower hair clip near her bangs. Beside and beneath her lies a long black-and-red mechanical polearm/naginata with a polished curved blade extending toward the lower left foreground. Behind her, show an enormous rust-red mechanical samurai bird or crane-like war machine towering over the city, made of layered armor plates, exposed pistons, cables, gears, rivets, glowing red optics, and a long blade-like beak or weapon arm; it should feel ancient, damaged, and industrial. The background is a vast dense dystopian Japanese megacity with pagoda rooftops, scaffolded towers, vertical signs with stylized kanji-like markings, misty skyscrapers, smokestacks, and a large multi-tiered cyber-temple on the right. Use a cool gray overcast sky, drifting debris and tiny birds, atmospheric haze, deep perspective, and muted desaturated colors with strong crimson accents. Composition: wide 4:3 landscape, character slightly right of center, giant mech on the left, city filling the horizon, roof tiles leading diagonally into the scene. Style: ultra-detailed anime concept art, intricate linework, realistic lighting, gritty sci-fi texture, cinematic scale, sharp focus on the character, no modern UI, no watermark, no readable English text.
promptEn: Create a highly detailed cinematic anime illustration of a cyberpunk feudal Japan city. She wears an ornate black-and-crimson futuristic samurai kimono armor outfit with layered sleeves, straps, belts, small hanging talismans, red trim, floral embroidery, mechanical details, white thigh-high socks, and black armored geta-like footwear. promptZh: 创作一张细节极其丰富的电影感动漫插画，描绘一座赛博朋克风格的封建日本城市。前景中，一位长着精灵耳的动漫少女，留着 浅蓝色短波波头，有着红色的眼睛，正平静地坐在深色瓦片的寺庙屋顶边缘，双腿向前，一只手撑在身后。她穿着华丽的黑红配色未来感武士和服盔甲，带有层叠的袖子、绑带、腰带、悬挂的小护身符、红色镶边、花卉刺绣、机械细节、白色过膝袜以及黑色的装甲木屐。在她的刘海附近加上一个小红花发夹。在她身旁和下方，放着一把黑红相间的机械长柄武器/薙刀，抛光的弯曲刀刃延伸至左下角的前景。在她身后，展示一台巨大的铁锈红机械武士鸟或鹤形战争机器，它高耸于城市之上，由层叠的装甲板、裸露的活塞、电缆、齿轮、铆钉、发光的红色光学元件以及长长的刀刃状喙或武器臂组成；它应呈现出古老、破损且工业化的质感。背景是一座广阔而密集的反乌托邦日本巨型城市，有宝塔屋顶、脚手架塔楼、带有程式化汉字标记的垂直招牌、雾气缭绕的摩天大楼、烟囱，以及右侧一座大型多层赛博寺庙。使用冷灰色的阴天，飘浮的碎片和细小的鸟儿，大气朦胧，深邃的透视感，以及带有强烈深红色点缀的柔和低饱和度色彩。构图：宽幅 4:3 横向，角色位于中心偏右，巨型机甲在左侧，城市填满地平线，屋顶瓦片呈对角线延伸入画面。风格：超精细动漫概念艺术，错综复杂的线条，写实的灯光，粗犷的科幻质感，电影级尺度，角色焦点清晰，无现代 UI，无水印，无易读的英文字符。
